title: Input schema for the keboola-igniter actor.

keboolaIgniter.title: Keboola Igniter input
keboolaIgniter.description: JSON object with targetActorId to run. This object will not be passed down to the target actor input.

mapping.title: Mapping module
mapping.description: Function that will create input for target actor or task. Parameter input is an array of objects read from Keboola input table.

inputTableRecord.title: Input table record
inputTableRecord.description: This field will be set from Keboola integration.
